A Look at Reciprocal Multifactorial Constants

This project is an in-depth analysis of a special set of infinite series called the reciprocal multifactorial series. We define it, prove a general closed form formula for the series, derive asymptotic approximations for the constants, and even prove a closed form formula for a Generalized Reciprocal Multifactorial Series.

Below you can read the full project. The Mathematica source code and LaTeX are available on GitHub.

View on GitHub
